outlook_paragraph: EOG Resources shows no active drilling sites detected via SAR at the decision date, with zero newly or continuously active pads, indicating a pause in near-term drilling momentum heading into Q2 2022. Despite the lack of current drilling activity, the deterministic revenue forecast remains at $5.21B, supported by a high average WTI price of ~$89.70 and a realized price differential at a 5% discount. With only 45% of revenue tied to this segment, broader company operations are likely offsetting stagnation in this particular area, allowing revenue to hold steady even in the absence of active development.
